evals.name: hf-dataset-google-arg-spanish
evals.prompt:
Add this dataset to the dataland registry: https://huggingface.co/datasets/ylacombe/google-argentinian-spanish

Save the resulting record JSON to <OUTPUT_DIR>/record.json so I can review it. Don't actually open a PR — just produce the record.
evals.expected_output: A single JSON record matching the dataset-only schema. Fields: id (next available), task='transcribe', input_type='audio', output_type='text', domain='general', language='es-AR', organization='Google' (the upstream source, not 'ylacombe'), license='CC-BY-SA 4.0', model='google-argentinian-spanish', year (a four-digit int around the upstream release), source_url='https://huggingface.co/datasets/ylacombe/google-argentinian-spanish', description that's 2-3 dense factual sentences naming the corpus content and quantitative scope (clips, hours, splits). MUST NOT include any 'ai_system', 'architecture', or 'params' fields — those were removed from the schema.

evals.name: mdc-dataset-voxforge
evals.prompt:
Log this dataset into the registry: https://mozilladatacollective.com/datasets/cmp2ggvbx00lvmp07i0xqlntr

Save to <OUTPUT_DIR>/record.json. Don't open a PR.
evals.expected_output: A JSON record for VoxForge Spanish. task='transcribe', input_type='audio', output_type='text', domain='general', language='Multilingual' (regional Spanish variants present but not coded per-speaker), organization='VoxForge', license='GPL-3.0', model='VoxForge - Spanish', year (~2026), description mentioning ~53 hours, ~23,537 utterances, and WAV+TSV format. MUST NOT include ai_system, architecture, or params fields.

evals.name: refuse-non-dataset-model-url
evals.prompt:
Register this model in the datahub: https://huggingface.co/microsoft/phi-2

Save to <OUTPUT_DIR>/record.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill should REFUSE to add this URL because the registry is datasets-only, and Phi-2 is a model card, not a dataset. The output should be a short refusal message explaining the registry only accepts dataset URLs (HF datasets, Mozilla Data Collective, etc.), and ask the user for a dataset URL instead. No record.json should be written.
